prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电子信息、人工智能等工科专业持续高热，清华大学相关专业为全国首选；宁夏2026年普通高考总 人数约66000人，较2025年（历史类+物理类=65897人）基本持平，竞争格局稳定；清华大学位于北京，为全国性顶尖学府，宁夏 考生报考不受地域偏好显著影响；该校在宁夏招生计划稳定，物理类18人、历史类2人，招生规模较小，位次波动空间有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 104; in 2025 (Physics Category), the minimum ranking was approximately 104. The rankings over the past two years have been highly stable, remaining around 104 with no significant fluctuations. The 2025 Physics Category enrollment plan was 18 students, and the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan remains 18 students, with no expansion or reduction. The History Category enrollment plan decreased from 3 students in 2025 to 2 students in 2026, slightly intensifying competition in the liberal arts group.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university, has consistently ranked first in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it the top institution in the country and highly attractive to top-tier candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general public opinion on school management and campus safety. However, as a top-tier institution, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on applications. Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with extremely high social attention, continuously attracting high-quality students. Tsinghua University has dozens of A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Architecture, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Business Administration, Law, and Marxist Theory, with top-tier academic strength that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly popular, and Tsinghua University's related majors are the top choice nationwide. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia general college entrance examination is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category = 65,897), maintaining a stable competitive landscape. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, a national top-tier institution, and Ningxia candidates' applications are not significantly affected by regional preferences. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia is stable, with 18 students in Physics Category and 2 in History Category, with a small enrollment scale, limiting ranking fluctuation space.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings (approximately 104 in both recent years), the unchanged 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (18 students), the basically stable total number of Ningxia candidates, Tsinghua University's consistently high social attention, and the strong attraction of its top-tier academic strength to high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will slightly decrease compared to the 2025 baseline ranking (104). Main considerations: the enrollment plan remains unchanged but the candidate base slightly increases, and as a national top-tier institution, the competition heat for Tsinghua University applications remains undiminished. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 108, with a range of 96–120.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (96–120) can actively apply, with Tier 2 majors as the main focus, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than 96 can focus on applying for flagship majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (PUMC).
